meta.title: Dogoyama Kogen Ski Area
meta.description: 広島県庄原市 — 中国地方。雪の有無が来場直結。

hero.title:
Dogoyama Kogen
Ski Area
hero.tagline: 中国地方。雪の有無が来場直結。

pivot.title:
A park that opens
when it snows.
pivot.lead: No snowmaking—operations depend on snowfall and weather. Not a battle of lifts and artificial snow like Rokko or Biwako Valley, but a small Showa-era hill with rare natural snow in Nara Prefecture.
pivot.noticeBody: The entry fee covers use of the snow park. On days when the lift is idle, an entry fee may still apply if snow play is possible—confirm today's status before you leave.
pivot.imgAlt: Lodge wood stove—the retro feel of Dogoyama Kogen Ski Area

primary.title: Private feel on natural snow
primary.lead: Fewer crowds than major Kansai hills, with lodge wood stoves and warm local service—for visitors who want snow and mountain-hut atmosphere more than the latest lifts.

secondary.title: Loop with Dorogawa Onsen
secondary.lead: The onsen town called "Kansai's Karuizawa"—day-use baths, famous-water soba, and shugendo heritage for a half- or full-day trip after snow play.

camp.title:
Warm up at
Dorogawa Onsen.
camp.lead: Dorogawa Onsen Visitor Center (opened 2024), historic Kakujin, Atarashiya Ryokan, and more—a classic finish with day-use baths after playing in the snow.
camp.imgAlt: Dorogawa onsen town—Gyoja Street and classic inns

nordic.title:
Gentle slopes
for families.
nordic.lead: Up to ~260 m, max gradient around 20°—good for sledding, snowmen, and first runs. The rope tow can take practice if you're new to it.
nordic.noticeBody: Operations may stop when snow is insufficient. Winter roads are narrow and snowy—check chains or winter tires and today's road info.
nordic.imgAlt: Oden at the lodge shop—a break after snow play

journey.title:
From Osaka,
one day in Dorogawa.
journey.lead: About 2.5 hours by car from Kansai—morning snow play, famous-water lunch, then limestone cave or onsen to finish.

01.title: From Kansai
01.body: ~2.5 h from Osaka · early start in winter

02.body: Confirm snow and lift before entry

05.title: Dorogawa Onsen
05.body: Visitor center or inn day-use bath

pivot.title: Reading a natural-snow hill
pivot.body: Operations work differently from artificial-snow resorts—how snow depth, lift status, and the entry-fee system relate.

nordicGuide.title: Family snow-play guide
nordicGuide.body: Sled areas, rope-tow tips, lodge snacks—a realistic half-day plan with kids.

campGuide.title: Dorogawa onsen & food guide
campGuide.body: Seikuro soba, Yamaguchiya tofu, Cafe Luna—winter Dorogawa is best with a walk through the onsen town.

access.note: ~2.5 h from Osaka · narrow snowy roads in winter · free parking
